api: Toggl Track API v9 (https://engineering.toggl.com/docs/track/), published OpenAPI 2.0 spec at https://engineering.toggl.com/assets/files/api-b2b7afb49ca646faff07d1e19b7b2afd.json (fetched 2026-07-03)
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion against Toggl Track's complete published OpenAPI spec (282 real operations across every documented tag). Covered: the 5 legacy-parity read streams (time_entries, projects, clients, workspace_users, organization_users) plus 2 new Pass B streams (tags, tasks — both workspace-scoped list endpoints matching the existing bundle shape), and 16 new write actions covering every dialect-expressible create/update/delete/stop mutation on time_entries, projects, clients, tags, and tasks. Excluded: billing/subscription/invoicing (organization-owner scope), SSO/SAML/desktop auth, organization/workspace administration (roles, rates, statistics, ownership transfer), the separate Reports/Saved-Reports API product, UI-personalization surfaces (favorites, dashboards, preferences, goals), binary-payload endpoints (avatars, workspace logo, zip exports), bulk/batch convenience actions duplicating the per-record streams/writes already covered, and a handful of internal/undocumented-shape endpoints (sync-server goals, smail webhook receiver) — every exclusion below carries a specific closed-vocabulary category and reason, no blanket bucket remains.

excluded.reason: organization security audit-log export; organization-owner security/compliance scope beyond this connector's workspace/organization-id config surface
